parameters.content:
## StatusCake Downtime Writer

Runs hourly. Imports 60 days of StatusCake `down` periods into `public.statuscake_downtime_periods`, then writes one current rolling-30-day uptime percentage point per cluster into `public.statuscake_uptime_timeseries`.

The webhook can draw the last 30 days of rolling-30-day uptime because the importer keeps the previous 60 days of raw downtime. Manual false-positive handling: set `is_valid = false` and optionally fill `note`; re-imports preserve both columns.

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.statuscake_downtime_periods (
  cluster TEXT NOT NULL,
  test_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  period_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  duration_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL,
  is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  note TEXT,
  source_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'down',
  raw JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  imported_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (test_id, period_id)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS statuscake_downtime_periods_cluster_started_idx
  ON public.statuscake_downtime_periods (cluster, started_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS statuscake_downtime_periods_valid_window_idx
  ON public.statuscake_downtime_periods (cluster, is_valid, started_at, ended_at);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.statuscake_uptime_timeseries (
  cluster TEXT NOT NULL,
  bucket_ts TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  uptime_percentage NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  downtime_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL,
  window_days INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (cluster, bucket_ts)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS statuscake_uptime_timeseries_cluster_bucket_idx
  ON public.statuscake_uptime_timeseries (cluster, bucket_ts DESC);
SELECT 1 AS ready;

parameters.jsCode:
function sqlString(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
}

const state = $items('Split Checks')[0].json;
const cluster = String(state.cluster || '').toLowerCase();
const pointTs = new Date().toISOString();
const windowDays = Number(state.windowDays || 30);
const windowSeconds = Math.floor(windowDays * 24 * 60 * 60);
const safeCluster = cluster.replace(/'/g, "''");
const safePointTs = pointTs.replace(/'/g, "''");

const snapshotSql = [
  'WITH params AS (',
  "  SELECT '" + safePointTs + "'::timestamptz AS end_ts,",
  "         ('" + safePointTs + "'::timestamptz - interval '" + windowDays + " days') AS start_ts,",
  '         ' + windowSeconds + '::numeric AS window_seconds',
  '), overlap AS (',
  '  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE',
  '    WHEN d.period_id IS NULL THEN 0',
  '    ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAST(d.ended_at, p.end_ts) - GREATEST(d.started_at, p.start_ts)))',
  '  END), 0)::numeric AS down_seconds',
  '  FROM params p',
  '  LEFT JOIN public.statuscake_downtime_periods d',
  "    ON d.cluster = '" + safeCluster + "'",
  '   AND d.is_valid = true',
  '   AND d.started_at < p.end_ts',
  '   AND d.ended_at > p.start_ts',
  '), inserted AS (',
  '  INSERT INTO public.statuscake_uptime_timeseries (cluster, bucket_ts, uptime_percentage, downtime_seconds, window_days)',
  '  SELECT',
  "    '" + safeCluster + "',",
  '    p.end_ts,',
  '    GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ROUND((100 * (1 - (o.down_seconds / NULLIF(p.window_seconds, 0))))::numeric, 4))),',
  '    ROUND(o.down_seconds::numeric, 0)::integer,',
  '    ' + windowDays,
  '  FROM params p CROSS JOIN overlap o',
  '  ON CONFLICT (cluster, bucket_ts) DO UPDATE SET',
  '    uptime_percentage = EXCLUDED.uptime_percentage,',
  '    downtime_seconds = EXCLUDED.downtime_seconds,',
  '    window_days = EXCLUDED.window_days,',
  '    updated_at = now()',
  '  RETURNING cluster, bucket_ts, uptime_percentage, downtime_seconds, window_days',
  '), cleanup_downtime AS (',
  "  DELETE FROM public.statuscake_downtime_periods WHERE ended_at < now() - interval '90 days' RETURNING 1",
  '), cleanup_series AS (',
  "  DELETE FROM public.statuscake_uptime_timeseries WHERE bucket_ts < now() - interval '90 days' RETURNING 1",
  ')',
  'SELECT * FROM inserted;'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...state, pointTs, snapshotSql } }];
